user_query: show me anomaly routes departing from albania
user_intent_summary: Identify anomalous routes originating in Albania by analyzing departure airports and associated alarm/event metrics.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for records where departure country is Albania (alb) and departure airport is Istanbul (ist). Groups by route (departure-arrival airports) to compute anomaly metrics on alarm counts (tot).

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for records where departure country is Albania (alb). Groups by route to compute anomaly metrics on alarm counts (allarmati).
